scripts.dev: npm run css && npm run build:worker:dev && NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider flareact dev
scripts.build:worker:dev: NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider NODE_ENV=development WORKER_DEV=true IS_WORKER=true npx webpack --config node_modules/flareact/webpack.js --mode development --output-path dist-worker --output-filename worker-bundle.js
scripts.build: npm run css && NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider flareact build && npm run build:worker
scripts.build:worker: NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider NODE_ENV=production IS_WORKER=true npx webpack --config node_modules/flareact/webpack.js --mode production --output-path dist-worker --output-filename worker-bundle.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
